name: scotus_future_query_set_30_mixed
description: A reusable mixed set of 30 evaluation queries: 25 case-targeted holding questions curated from the downloaded Supreme Court case files plus 5 deliberately off-target queries for future retrieval, generation, and verification tests.
query_style: mixed case-targeted and off-target evaluation queries
selection_notes: Queries were inspired by the downloaded case texts, especially syllabus holding language.
The set favors substantive merits decisions and clear procedural rulings over DIGs, publication pages, and duplicate revision variants.
Learning Resources, Inc. v. Trump uses the canonical case name rather than the revision-suffixed duplicate.
The final 5 queries are intentionally weakly related or unrelated to the downloaded cases and can be used as out-of-scope or false-positive checks.

queries.query: In Galette v. New Jersey Transit Corp., what did the Supreme Court hold about whether NJ Transit is an arm of New Jersey for interstate sovereign immunity purposes?
queries.case_name: Galette v. New Jersey Transit Corp.
queries.topic: whether NJ Transit is an arm of New Jersey for interstate sovereign immunity purposes

queries.query: In Urias-Orellana v. Bondi, what did the Supreme Court hold about the standard of review courts of appeals must apply to the BIA's persecution determination on undisputed facts?
queries.topic: the standard of review for the BIA's persecution determination on undisputed facts

queries.query: In Geo Group, Inc. v. Menocal, what did the Supreme Court hold about whether denial of Yearsley protection is immediately appealable?
queries.topic: whether denial of Yearsley protection is immediately appealable

queries.query: In Villarreal v. Texas, what did the Supreme Court hold about whether a qualified conferral order during an overnight recess violates the Sixth Amendment right to counsel?
queries.topic: whether a qualified conferral order during an overnight recess violates the Sixth Amendment right to counsel

queries.query: In Hain Celestial Group, Inc. v. Palmquist, what did the Supreme Court hold about whether an erroneous post-removal dismissal cured the jurisdictional defect that existed at removal?
queries.case_name: Hain Celestial Group, Inc. v. Palmquist
queries.topic: whether an erroneous post-removal dismissal cured a jurisdictional defect existing at removal

queries.query: In Postal Service v. Konan, what did the Supreme Court hold about whether the FTCA postal exception preserves sovereign immunity for intentional nondelivery of mail?
queries.topic: whether the FTCA postal exception preserves sovereign immunity for intentional nondelivery of mail

queries.query: In Learning Resources, Inc. v. Trump, what did the Supreme Court hold about whether IEEPA authorizes the President to impose tariffs?
queries.topic: whether IEEPA authorizes the President to impose tariffs

queries.query: In Bouarfa v. Mayorkas, what did the Supreme Court hold about whether federal courts may review revocation of an approved visa petition based on a sham-marriage determination under 1155?
queries.topic: whether federal courts may review revocation of an approved visa petition based on a sham-marriage determination under 1155

queries.query: In E.M.D. Sales, Inc. v. Carrera, what did the Supreme Court hold about the burden of proof for establishing an FLSA exemption?
queries.topic: the burden of proof for establishing an FLSA exemption

queries.query: In Royal Canin U. S. A. v. Wullschleger, what did the Supreme Court hold about whether deleting the federal claims after removal strips supplemental jurisdiction and requires remand?
queries.case_name: Royal Canin U. S. A. v. Wullschleger
queries.topic: whether deleting the federal claims after removal strips supplemental jurisdiction and requires remand

queries.query: In TikTok Inc. v. Garland, what did the Supreme Court hold about whether the challenged divest-or-ban provisions violated the petitioners' First Amendment rights?
queries.topic: whether the challenged divest-or-ban provisions violated the petitioners' First Amendment rights

queries.query: In Hungary v. Simon, what did the Supreme Court hold about whether alleging commingling of expropriated funds alone satisfies the FSIA expropriation exception's commercial nexus requirement?
queries.topic: whether alleging commingling of expropriated funds alone satisfies the FSIA expropriation exception's commercial nexus requirement

queries.query: In Williams v. Reed, what did the Supreme Court hold about whether state courts may apply exhaustion rules to bar 1983 claims challenging administrative delay?
queries.topic: whether state courts may apply exhaustion rules to bar 1983 claims challenging administrative delay

queries.query: In Wisconsin Bell, Inc. v. United States ex rel. Heath, what did the Supreme Court hold about whether E-Rate reimbursement requests are claims under the False Claims Act?
queries.case_name: Wisconsin Bell, Inc. v. United States ex rel. Heath
queries.topic: whether E-Rate reimbursement requests are claims under the False Claims Act

queries.query: In Lackey v. Stinnie, what did the Supreme Court hold about whether plaintiffs who obtained only preliminary injunctive relief before mootness are prevailing parties under 1988(b)?
queries.topic: whether plaintiffs who obtained only preliminary injunctive relief before mootness are prevailing parties under 1988(b)

queries.query: In Dewberry Group, Inc. v. Dewberry Engineers Inc., what did the Supreme Court hold about whether Lanham Act disgorgement may include profits of nonparty corporate affiliates?
queries.case_name: Dewberry Group, Inc. v. Dewberry Engineers Inc.
queries.topic: whether Lanham Act disgorgement may include profits of nonparty corporate affiliates

queries.query: In Waetzig v. Halliburton Energy Services, Inc., what did the Supreme Court hold about whether a voluntary dismissal without prejudice counts as a final proceeding under Rule 60(b)?

queries.case_name: Ames v. Ohio Department of Youth Services

queries.query: What is the best federal tax strategy for a freelancer who wants to reduce quarterly payments using LLC election tricks?
queries.topic: freelancer tax strategy and LLC election planning

queries.topic: FAA regulation of commercial drone deliveries in residential neighborhoods

queries.topic: hospital cash pricing transparency for emergency procedures
